AppTagline: A self-hosted film quote REST API.
RestApiDescription: The Quotinator API serves real, verified film quotes over a clean REST interface.
AboutDescription: Quotinator is built with ASP.NET Core (.NET 10) and deployed as a Docker container targeting linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
AboutRoadmapV2: SQLite backend, write endpoints, management UI
TranslationsQuoteContent: Quote content is stored in its original language. Where a manual translation exists, append ?lang= to any endpoint to request it — for example ?lang=nl for Dutch.
TranslationsUi: The UI and API error messages follow your browser's language preference automatically.
ErrorSearchQueryRequired: The q parameter is required. Provide a search term.
ErrorSearchQueryTooLong: The search term must not exceed 200 characters.
ErrorLangInvalid: lang must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, nl, de).
ErrorTypeInvalid: type must be one of: movie, tv, anime, book, person.
ErrorTooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please slow down.
ErrorLimitOutOfRange: limit must be a whole number between 1 and 100.
ErrorRandomNOutOfRange: n must be a whole number between 1 and 100.
ErrorPageOutOfRange: page must be a whole number of 1 or greater.
ErrorPageSizeOutOfRange: pageSize must be a whole number between 1 and 100.
ErrorQuoteNotFound: No quote with the requested ID was found.
ErrorFieldInvalid: field must be one of: quote, source, character, author.
ErrorGenreInvalid: One or more genre values are not recognised. Valid genres: action, adventure, animation, comedy, drama, fantasy, fiction, horror, mystery, non-fiction, romance, sci-fi, thriller.
InfoNoQuotesMatchFilters: No quotes match the given filters.
ErrorFilterInputTooLong: Filter values must not exceed 200 characters.
ErrorFilterInputInvalid: One or more filter values contain invalid characters.
ErrorDecadeInvalid: decade must be a year divisible by 10 (e.g. 1980, 1990, 2000).
ErrorYearRangeInvalid: yearFrom must not be greater than yearTo.
AdminEndpointsDescription: These endpoints require an X-Api-Key header matching the admin_api_key configured in the add-on options. They are unavailable when no key is configured.
